"use client"; // src/QueryErrorResetBoundary.tsx import * as React from "react"; import { jsx } from "react/jsx-runtime"; function createValue() { let isReset = false; return { clearReset: () => { isReset = false; }, reset: () => { isReset = true; }, isReset: () => { return isReset; } }; } var QueryErrorResetBoundaryContext = React.createContext(createValue()); var useQueryErrorResetBoundary = () => React.useContext(QueryErrorResetBoundaryContext); var QueryErrorResetBoundary = ({ children }) => { const [value] = React.useState(() => createValue()); return /* @__PURE__ */ jsx(QueryErrorResetBoundaryContext.Provider, { value, children: typeof children === "function" ? children(value) : children }); }; export { QueryErrorResetBoundary, useQueryErrorResetBoundary }; //# sourceMappingURL=QueryErrorResetBoundary.js.map
